ValidationRule.description: Require Close Reason Detail when Service Competitor is Other
ValidationRule.errorConditionFormula: AND( RecordType.DeveloperName = "ServiceContract", ISPICKVAL(StageName , "Closed Lost"), ISPICKVAL(Closed_Reason__c , "Using 3rd party service provider/in-house"), ISPICKVAL(Service_Competitor__c , "Other"), ISBLANK(Reason_Lost_Detail__c) )
ValidationRule.errorMessage: Close Reason Detail is required is when Service_Competitor__c = Other
